headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Rockwell Automation (ROK) After A 63% One Year Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether Rockwell Automation's current share price still offers value, the recent performance gives you plenty to think about. The stock last closed at US$407.43, with returns of 1.6% over 7 days, 10.4% over 30 days, 2.2% year to date, 63.1% over 1 year, 51.3% over 3 years, and 63.9% over 5 years. This helps frame the context for any valuation work you do today. Recent attention around Rockwell Automation has focused on its role in industrial automation and factory...
